sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79079" key="parafwtismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραφωτισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">φωτίζω</etym>) <sense id="n79079.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">false light</tr_>, as of the sun after setting, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1866.tlg001:45J" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Posidon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45J.</biblScope> </bibl> (<abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l.</abbr> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">περιφωτ</itype>-).</sense> </entryFree>
